title: romulea citrina
intro: Romulea citrina, also known as the Golden Romulea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the southwestern parts of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Romulea citrina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health ailments.
